base.heading: Signature Component
base.text: The signature component allows you to display credits and dates

small.heading: Signature Component - Small Avatar
small.text: Give credit to someone that barely deserves it.

dateonly.heading: Signature Component - Without a name
dateonly.text: Do not give credit, just some dates.

with-avatar.heading: Signature Component - With Avatar
with-avatar.text: Displays the author with a real avatar image instead of the generated placeholder.

no-avatar.heading: Signature Component - No Avatar
no-avatar.text: Renders the author name and role without any avatar by disabling the placeholder.

published-only.heading: Signature Component - Published Date Only
published-only.text: Shows a single published date alongside the author, without an updated date.
